title: tetraria elongata
intro: Tetraria elongata, also known as the umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Restionaceae, native to the southern hemisphere. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tetraria elongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in topical applications to promote healing and skin health.
